description:
Rail-first browser with privacy tools and one-handed controls
Solipsism Browser is a rail-first Android WebView browser designed around one-handed browsing. Navigation, tabs, search, QR scanning, refresh, and the overflow menu live in a compact side rail that can be placed on the left or right.

The browser focuses on mobile ergonomics, privacy-aware controls, and a tactile Material Design 3 Expressive-inspired interface.

Features include:

* Left or right browser rail with multiple sizes, including Super Compact mode
* WebView tabs, tab overview, bookmarks, history, downloads, and find in page
* Full URL editor opened from the vertical URL rail
* Built-in QR scanner powered by ZXing
* Install Website as App support through Android pinned shortcuts
* Incognito browsing, ad blocking, cookie controls, WebRTC settings, and clear-on-exit options
* Decoy Mode for replacing recent browsing history with randomized realistic browsing sessions
* Custom homepage with wallpaper and bookmark shortcuts
* Fullscreen video handling for landscape playback

Solipsism Browser does not include advertising SDKs, analytics SDKs, Firebase, or Google Play Services dependencies.
